name: LRT Jabodebek Schedule Candidate (Local Only)
source_name: LRT Jabodebek official website departure schedule
limitations: Local-only app data; not cleared for redistribution or deployment.
Schedule license and reuse terms are unknown.
OpenStreetMap geometry is ODbL-licensed and attribution/share-alike obligations are not configured for deployment.
Source is station-level weekday/holiday departure tables, not a GTFS feed.
Official trip IDs and destination labels are not exposed by the source page.
Outbound Dukuh Atas departures are split evenly between the Bekasi and Cibubur branches for visualization.
Intermediate stop times are interpolated from official approximate route runtimes.
Trips and calendars are locally derived and are not official GTFS service records.
